responsibilities: Coordinate daily project activities between design teams, contractors, and clients to ensure alignment with project goals
Manage submittals, RFIs, and change orders to maintain accurate project documentation and minimize schedule delays
Develop and monitor project schedules using Primavera P6 to track milestones and identify potential delays
Prepare cost estimates and budget forecasts to support project financial tracking and reporting to stakeholders
Review construction drawings and specifications to verify design intent and identify potential constructability issues
Facilitate progress meetings and prepare status reports to communicate project updates to leadership and clients
Support contract administration activities including bid evaluation, vendor negotiations, and compliance tracking
Conduct site visits to monitor construction progress and verify quality and safety standards are being met
